scripts.dev: concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,magenta 'bun run --filter @ink-mirror/daemon dev' 'bun run --filter @ink-mirror/web dev'
scripts.start: bun run build && concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,magenta 'bun run --filter @ink-mirror/daemon start' 'bun run --filter @ink-mirror/web start'
scripts.test: bun test packages/shared packages/daemon/tests packages/cli/tests packages/web/tests
